title: Thrixspermum emarginatum
taxonomy: Thrixspermum emarginatum is a species of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae, which includes approximately 30,000 species of orchids. The genus Thrixspermum is part of the subfamily Orchidoideae, within the Orchidaceae family. Thrixspermum emarginatum is classified as a terrestrial orchid, native to the tropical regions of Asia. The classification is based on its morphological and molecular characteristics, along with its unique growth habits.
